transcript:
CALLER: Hello. Mujhe ek dietitian se milna hai. Apna weight manage karna chahta hoon properly.
AGENT: Bahut acha decision! Humare paas registered dietitian Ms. Pooja Tarte hain. Aapka naam aur number?
CALLER: Sameer Kadam. 9700998877.
AGENT: Shukriya Sameer ji. Ms. Tarte Somvaar, Budhwaar aur Shanivar ko available hoti hain. Kab aana chahenge?
CALLER: Shanivar subah agar ho toh.
AGENT: Shanivar 10 AM ka slot hai. Book kar doon?
CALLER: Haan, kar dijiye.
AGENT: Done! Sameer Kadam, Shanivar 10 AM, Ms. Pooja Tarte. SMS confirmation aayega. Best of luck with your health journey!
